questionHtml:
The image shows chromosomes from an insect (2 n = 8).

Which pair of chromosomes are the sex chromosomes of this insect species?

A.  c and e

B.  a and h

C.  f and h

D.  a and e

meta.title: The image shows chromosomes from an insect (2 n = 8). Which pair of chromosomes are the sex chromosomes of this insect species? A. c and e B. a and h C. f and h D. a and e
